name: op_focus_blur
description: ZOMBIE-OP PROOF (focus / blur): both ops were DECLARED in DebugEvent with no match arm, so they fell through to the `_ => Unhandled` catch-all and answered `ok` while doing nothing. They now push CallbackChange::ModifyWindowState with window_focused / flags.has_focus flipped, which the shared apply_user_change() applies exactly the way WM_SETFOCUS / WM_KILLFOCUS / X11 FocusIn|FocusOut do: save previous_window_state, mutate current_window_state, run the state-diff pass (which derives WindowFocusIn / WindowFocusOut). This test asserts the WINDOW STATE ACTUALLY CHANGES — a vacuous `ok` leaves `focused` pinned at its start value and every assertion below goes red.

css: html, body { margin: 0; padding: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; }
